text:
catastrophic coverage phase). A tier may include 
multiple drug types. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 6 (starting in 2018, length is 2) 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: For 2007 — 2017 data — this is a binary character string where each digit is a 1 or 0 to accommodate a 
variety of types of drugs. For example, if the value = 110000 (1s in the 1st and 2nd digits), then generic 
and non-preferred brand drugs are covered on this tier during the coverage gap phase. 

1 in 1st digit = Non-Preferred
